name: chunk-v1-medium
description: 64 KB chunk — typical mid-size payload, exercises multi-block ChaCha20.

name: chunk-v1-tampered-ciphertext
description: Same inputs as small case, but envelope byte at offset 24 (start of AEAD ciphertext, just past the 24-byte nonce) XOR'd with 0x01. Decryption must fail.
